channel.title: Patch Updates on Crime Empire Guide
channel.description: Recent content in Patch Updates on Crime Empire Guide

item.title: v0.4.5 Anniversary Update: Full Patch Notes and Meta Impact
item.description:
Short answer: v0.4.5 (March 30, 2026) added the Golden M1911 pistol, Big Sprinkler for faster plant watering, a reorder feature for the delivery app, and dynamic reticle for ranged weapons. Meta impact: Big Sprinkler changes Botanist efficiency and watering throughput. No major recipe or police behavior changes.

New Additions in v0.4.5

Feature Type Unlock Impact
Golden M1911 Weapon Casino vending machine (rare drop) Cosmetic, same stats as M1911
Big Sprinkler Equipment Dan's Hardware, $200 Waters 4 plants at once -- huge automation upgrade
Reorder Feature UI Automatic One-click repeat of last delivery order
Dynamic Reticle UI Automatic Crosshair changes size based on accuracy
Bug reporting tool System Steam overlay Report issues in-game

Big Sprinkler: The Real Game-Changer

The Big Sprinkler is the most impactful addition in v0.4.5. It replaces the basic sprinkler and covers a 4-plant area in one activation.

item.title: Schedule 1 Complete Update History (v0.1 to v0.4.5)
item.description:
Short answer: Schedule 1 launched March 24, 2025. The first major content update (v0.3.4) shipped two weeks later on April 7. v0.2.4 added co-op multiplayer. v0.4.5 Anniversary Update (March 30, 2026) added Big Sprinkler and Golden M1911. The game receives patches approximately every 4-6 weeks.

Full Version Timeline (source: Fandom Wiki)

Version Date Key Additions
v0.1.x Mar 24, 2025 Initial early access release, basic mixing, 1 zone
v0.1.14 Mar-Apr 2025 Multi-dragging, physics improvements
v0.1.15 Mar-Apr 2025 Pickpocketing, counter-offer system
v0.1.16 Mar-Apr 2025 Snake minigame, bug fixes
v0.2.4 Apr 2025 Co-op multiplayer (up to 4 players)
v0.2.5 Apr 2025 Customer behavior improvements
v0.2.6 Apr 2025 Packaging Station MK II
v0.2.7 Apr-May 2025 More effects, mixing changes
v0.2.8 Apr-May 2025 Mixing Station MK II
v0.2.9 Apr-May 2025 New ambient music, optimization, map additions
v0.3.4 2025.04.07 Pawn Shop, Fancy Stuff, functional shops
v0.3.5 2025.05.08 Jukebox, Storage Unit
v0.3.6 2025.06.08 Filters, Employee Tweaks, Save System improvements
v0.4.0 2025.08.28 Cartel Update -- Benzies Family, major content
v0.4.1 2025.11.02 Halloween Update
v0.4.2 2025.12.26 Shrooms Update
v0.4.3 2026.02.03 Storage Closets update
v0.4.4 2026.03.19 Weather Update
v0.4.5 2026.03.30 Anniversary Update -- Big Sprinkler, Golden M1911

What Each Major Version Changed

v0.1.x (Launch, Mar 2025): Core drug mixing and selling loop. Single zone map, basic suppliers, no employees. The game was functional but shallow.
